title: GPU Historical Trends (1h Downsampled)
description: Min/Avg/Max temperature, power, and utilization over 90 days using hourly aggregates

list.name: target_name
list.query: from(bucket: "gpu_metrics_hourly") |> range(start: -90d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gpu_metrics_1h") |> keep(columns: ["target_name"]) |> group() |> distinct(column: "target_name")

targets.query:
from(bucket: "gpu_metrics_hourly")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gpu_metrics_1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gpu_die_temp_celsius_min")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.target_name =~ /^${target_name:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: min, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "gpu_metrics_hourly")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gpu_metrics_1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gpu_die_temp_celsius_avg")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.target_name =~ /^${target_name:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "gpu_metrics_hourly")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gpu_metrics_1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gpu_die_temp_celsius_max")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.target_name =~ /^${target_name:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "gpu_metrics_hourly")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gpu_metrics_1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gpu_memory_temp_celsius_min")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.target_name =~ /^${target_name:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: min, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "gpu_metrics_hourly")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gpu_metrics_1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gpu_memory_temp_celsius_avg")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.target_name =~ /^${target_name:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "gpu_metrics_hourly")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gpu_metrics_1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gpu_memory_temp_celsius_max")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.target_name =~ /^${target_name:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "gpu_metrics_hourly")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gpu_metrics_1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gpu_power_watts_min")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.target_name =~ /^${target_name:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: min, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "gpu_metrics_hourly")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gpu_metrics_1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gpu_power_watts_avg")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.target_name =~ /^${target_name:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "gpu_metrics_hourly")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gpu_metrics_1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gpu_power_watts_max")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.target_name =~ /^${target_name:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "gpu_metrics_hourly")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gpu_metrics_1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field =~ /^(gpu_total_power_watts|board_power_watts)_min$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.target_name =~ /^${target_name:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: min, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "gpu_metrics_hourly")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field =~ /^(gpu_total_power_watts|board_power_watts)_avg$/)

from(bucket: "gpu_metrics_hourly")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gpu_metrics_1h")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field =~ /^(gpu_total_power_watts|board_power_watts)_max$/)

  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
